Summary: Deploy 23-status-code tracking system to enable accurate measurement of all sharing requests. Foundation for all optimization.
Rationale: FOUNDATIONAL REQUIREMENT. Cannot optimize what we cannot measure. All other initiatives depend on accurate data. 350K request analysis revealed gaps in current tracking.

Summary: API endpoint for SPs to verify document availability before creating share requests. Prevents futile requests.
Rationale: Data shows 20.6% of requests (72K/week) fail due to missing docs with 0% success rate. Highest ROI quick win. SP-positive - reduces wasted integration effort.

Summary: Dedicated investigation and fix sprint for Android platform covering notifications, UX friction, crashes, and performance.
Rationale: Data shows Android at 67.7% vs iOS 77.8% - 10 percentage point gap affecting 43% of users. 15K lost shares/week is material.

Summary: A/B test redesign of consent screen with clearer value proposition, trust indicators, and progress steps.
Rationale: 16.9% abandon at consent screen (biggest funnel leak). 28K users with docs available still abandon. Data-validated opportunity.

Summary: Implement intelligent retry with exponential backoff and circuit breaker for issuer document retrieval failures.
Rationale: 26.1% of technical failures (3167/week) are issuer retrieval issues. Many are transient and recoverable with retry logic.

Summary: One-time consent for DV to periodically check and auto-add new/updated documents from issuers.
Rationale: Addresses root cause of 20.6% dead-on-arrival requests. Proactive beats reactive. Legal dependency is key risk.

Summary: Complete transition from DDA eSeal service to ICP self-signing with own HSM. Ensure SP validation compatibility.
Rationale: Already in progress. Critical dependency resolution. Low effort (mostly coordination) but high impact if fails.

Summary: Complete Primary/Secondary EID handling with final EN/AR copy approval and edge case handling.
Rationale: Feature completion for Special Emirati Citizenship users. In development, needs GA release. Limited user segment but strategic.

Summary: Grid view, copy-any-field, empty states, PDF viewer revamp, issuer logo chips.
Rationale: Multiple UX issues identified in user research and Miro boards. Low-medium effort bundle with cumulative impact.

Summary: Reduce latency between consent and PIN, add progress state, implement session recovery and reminder notifications.
Rationale: 4.3% drop-off after consent but before PIN. Data-validated opportunity to recover engaged users.

Summary: Send reminder notification if user hasn't acted on document request within configurable time window.
Rationale: From Miro boards - low effort conversion optimization. Users who received notification but took no action.

Summary: Notify users when requested documents become available so they can complete pending sharing flows.
Rationale: Data shows document availability is THE critical factor. Proactive notification enables recovery of pending flows.

Summary: Analyze and reduce loading screen frequency throughout the app. Analysis complete in Miro backlog.
Rationale: Analysis already complete (DVT-2457/2529). Implementation opportunity from Miro backlog.

Summary: Progressive skeleton/shimmer loading UX pattern for improved perceived performance. Part 1 complete.
Rationale: From Miro boards - Part 1 done, Part 2 opportunity. Improves perceived performance during async operations.

Summary: Infrastructure to enable rapid A/B testing of consent screen variations via Firebase Remote Config.
Rationale: Required for consent screen redesign. Enables continuous optimization based on real user behavior.

Summary: Secure QR verification with masked references, time-limited codes, anti-replay protection for in-person use cases.
Rationale: Enables new use cases (hospitals, hotels, HR). 10x SP ecosystem potential. Requires multi-stakeholder approval.

Summary: Select and integrate analytics tool (UXCam/Firebase Analytics) to enable data-driven optimization.
Rationale: From Miro boards - tool evaluated but never selected. Critical foundation for all UX optimization work.

Summary: Dashboard showing SP conversion metrics, quality scorecard, best practices guidance, and quarterly reviews.
Rationale: SP behavior impacts conversion. No current mechanism to surface or incentivize improvement.

Summary: In-app feedback tool and banner for user research recruitment to enable continuous discovery.
Rationale: From Miro boards - planned but never built. Essential for validating UX changes.

Summary: Optimize eSeal signing payload, implement async signing for large documents, add progress indicator.
Rationale: 19.6% of technical failures are signing timeouts. Data-validated opportunity.

Summary: Implement platform-specific (iOS/Android) error recovery flows based on observed failure patterns.
Rationale: Data analysis shows different failure patterns by platform. Tailored recovery improves success rates.

Summary: Quick share from push notification, home screen, or notifications screen without full consent flow.
Rationale: From Miro boards - reduces friction but requires consent mechanism revision. Legal dependency.

Summary: FAQ replacement chatbot to answer simple customer inquiries and reduce support burden.
Rationale: From Miro boards - detailed planning exists but never delivered. High effort, medium impact.

Summary: Dedicated tab for all sharing requests, SP list, and sharing history for improved discoverability.
Rationale: From Miro boards - improves sharing UX but high effort for incremental benefit.

Summary: Allow users to choose specific parts/fields of a document to share rather than full document.
Rationale: From Miro boards - privacy feature but requires significant legal and technical work.

Summary: Allow users to revoke previously shared document access from SPs.
Rationale: From Miro boards - control feature but complex implementation and legal review required.

Summary: Personal statistics dashboard showing docs requested, shared, environmental savings, usage patterns.
Rationale: From Miro boards - engagement feature. Nice to have but not conversion-impacting.

Summary: Advanced QR with NFC tap-to-verify, selective disclosure, W3C VC alignment, lightweight SP onboarding.
Rationale: Depends on Phase 1 success. Advanced capabilities for scale.

Summary: System-wide dark theme support for accessibility and user preference.
Rationale: From Miro boards - marked as P3/non-value-added. Correctly deprioritized.

Summary: Mark frequently used documents as favorites for quick access.
Rationale: From Miro boards (DVT-1539) - convenience feature. Low impact on conversion.

Summary: ML model predicting document availability with proactive notifications and smart recommendations.
Rationale: Requires ML infrastructure and privacy review. High effort, uncertain ROI.

Summary: Show environmental impact (trees saved, paper reduced) from using digital documents.
Rationale: From Miro boards - marketing feature with no conversion impact.

Summary: Advanced chatbot for document search, request assistance, language translation, and summarization.
Rationale: From Miro boards - depends on Stage 1 success. High complexity.
